summary
 performances live releases broadcasts lyrics  

Litho Blitho 

Composer
Matthews
Evolved From:Mother Father
Song Category
Misc Release

Releases

V/A Compilations - Soundtracks: 1
V/A Compilations - Retail: 1

Song History

This instrumental number was supposedly recorded by Dave during the studio sessions for his "Some Devil" album. It was officially released on a compilation CD called Sounds of Wood and Steel, Vol. 3.

The riff is exactly that of the Mother Father bridge/outro, and the words "litho" and "blitho" supposedly mean mother and father in an African language (note: we suspect that this is false, much like the apocryphal translation of "Pantala Naga Pampa" meaning "welcome to our home" in Gambian, which is not a language). Also worth noting about the title is that it was recorded in Studio Litho, which is Stone Gossard's studio in Seattle ("litho" is a Greek root word for "stone").

No Known Full Live Performances
